description: Vast open water stretching beyond sight, where the depths hold more secrets than any land and the surface is never truly still.
biomes: Deep Sea
Black water pressing in from all sides. No light reaches here, and the creatures that drift past glow with their own cold fire.
Tidal Flat
A wide expanse of wet sand and shallow pools exposed by the retreating tide. The sea will return, and quickly.
Coast
Where the waves meet the land in a restless line of foam. Salt spray hangs in the air and gulls wheel overhead.
Jagged Rocks
Sharp stone teeth jutting from the surf, slick with spray. The waves crash and split around them with furious force.
Whirlpools
Spinning columns of water that drag everything downward. The surface swirls in lazy circles that hide the violence beneath.
Islands
Small patches of land rising from the open sea. Each one is its own world, isolated and full of surprises.
Coral Reef
Bright formations of living stone beneath clear water. Fish dart in clouds of color, but the edges are sharp enough to cut.
Abyssal Trench
A crack in the ocean floor plunging into lightless depths. The pressure builds and the water grows colder with every fathom.
Kelp Forest
Tall fronds of brown and green swaying in the current like an underwater woodland. The light filters through in golden shafts.
Floating Debris
A drifting field of wreckage and driftwood rocking on the swells. Something useful might be tangled in there, or something worse.
